reviews.review_description: This was super fun after you get the hang of the controls, (which doesn't take too long). So super short though. Already want the next 'chapter'!! :)

developer_response.body: Thanks. Tomorrow at 1pm PST the full paid version replaces the Free First Chapter. Happy Halloween !

reviews.review_description: Really nice preview. Can't wait to see the full game.
I think it looks like a lot of fun but i cant download it so i cant properly rate it

developer_response.body: Hello, What type of phone do you have and are you sure you have enough available space on your phone to download it ? Let us know on dev@apelab.ch if we can help resolve your download issue. The Apelab Team.

reviews.review_description: The alien people are weird, very immersive (the elevator was a trip)...nicely done with great voice over. Will buy full version!

developer_response.body: The full version is coming Tomorrow at 1pm PST, just in time for Halloween ! We hope you enjoy it.

reviews.review_description: Cannot wait for more.

reviews.review_title: I like the game, but I am basically mad
reviews.review_description:
The only reason I basically don’t like this game is because you have to restart I give a rating. I still love the game and I let my brother play on it. All he does is just stand there and want my mom there a dead body on the floor, you know I played it too, but I did not like when I first got the game and there was a dead body on the floor.
 Like helll no i’m sorry for saying H word
😡😀😀😀😀
And you know how much I love the game 
And how much I hate it so much that it makes me want to throw the VR it’s ok

👍👍👍👍👍👍🧙🏻‍♂️👦🏻
:3 ._.
Fantastique use of the gear vr controller. Cant wait for the next chapter.
I was streaming this on discord and my friends like the experience but when it was done I was like aww men I wish it was free I really liked the first chapter very very good keep up  ^^

reviews.review_title: Awesome Experience - can't wait for more
reviews.review_description:
This app is awesome.

Great graphics
Story
Superb use of controller and very intuitive for gear VR

I hope full app is released soon
This is the best game out of all of them
This game is amazing and very detailed to the point but, there was a few glitches when I purchased the full game sometime I would even need to reset my entire vr. Overall review...good game
This free demo is absolutely amazing, I really reccomend downloading it if you like magic.

Super game.  Would buy the full game if it wasn't for my Faulty Go controler.  

Developers must take in consideration that the up down left right buttons on the go controler don't work well.   In that case, had a lot of trouble bringing object closer with the up down button

Really nice demo.  cool idea.

The demo lets you play the first level. The game is a lot of fun and I liked the humour, though on the downside I found the GO controller a bit tricky to use at first. As this is free it gets five stars for originality and design. As the full game is very cheap I will  be buying it soon.
Please add more chapters. I can't wait

developer_response.body: Tomorrow at 1pm PST the full paid version comes out. Be on the lookout for the update !

reviews.review_title: Amazing use of the VR Remote and Fun
reviews.review_description: Is there a date or so we should expect the full game ? I'm really looking forward to the full game.

developer_response.body: The full version is coming Tomorrow at 1pm PST, just in time for Halloween ! We hope you enjoy it.

reviews.review_description: Nice graphics, interactive. But. When i arrive on stage, nothing happens. I moved 2 carts with my oculus go controller, moved them in the air. But nothing happens. ???

Baffling at first, once you understand what is required to progress, however, you will be amazed by how involved you get in your "performance." Dressing room allows gamer to learn to move about, grab items, trash the room (felt like a 70s rock star in a hotel),  and refine object manipulation. Still, after all that practise, I'm grateful the audience was so patient & forgiving with my mistakes. :-)

I will replay so that my performance is flawless. Thanks for the adventure, devs.
I love this game, is the 2nd chapter available for free as well.
